title: Suricatoos — Sensor OpenVAS Report
description: The findings an internal scanner sensor POSTs to the cloud mTLS /ingest/v1/sensor-report endpoint (ADR-0007). The cloud DISCARDS the sensor's claimed severity/CVE and re-attests them from the central feed by OID (gmp-bridge --mode network); it also drops any finding whose host is outside the tenant's authorized scope. The tenant is derived from the verified cert O, never trusted from this body.

correlation_id.description: end-to-end anchor from the dispatched scan-job

tenant.description: cross-check only; the cert O is authoritative

feed_version.description: the sensor's feed version (surfaced for drift alerting)

findings.description: Normalized OpenVAS results (the scan_bridge fetch shape). severity/cves here are NOT trusted — the cloud re-derives them from the feed by oid.

host.description: IP literal; a non-IP host is dropped (no re-resolution)

oid.description: NVT OID — the ONLY value used to look up authoritative severity/CVE
